twitter_thread: 40% of Office App users will see a change: 3 out of 5 apps now use Anthropic models, not OpenAI.
Microsoft replaced OpenAI with Anthropic in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint to cut errors by 17%.
Anthropic's AI can handle 5x more conversational queries than OpenAI, improving Office App Q&A.
Error rates dropped 25% with Anthropic, but 12% of users still report compatibility issues.
Anthropic models process 30k+ documents daily, a 50% increase since replacing OpenAI in Office Apps.
Excel users will see the biggest impact: Anthropic's AI can analyze 2x more data in half the time.
Have you noticed faster document processing since Office Apps switched to Anthropic models? #officeapps #ai
pack.linkedin: With 40% of Office App users affected, the shift to Anthropic models is significant. The change brings a 17% error reduction and 50% increase in document processing capacity. Anthropic's AI handles 5x more conversational queries and analyzes 2x more data in half the time. Initial tests show a 25% error rate decrease, despite 12% of users reporting issues. How will this impact your workflow and what benefits do you expect from the new AI models?
